title: Thrash
description:
Deal 4 damage twice.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a random Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and add its damage to this card.
upgraded_description:
Deal 6 damage twice.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a random Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and add its damage to this card.
notes: Exhausts a random Attack card from your hand and adds its damage to this card's total for the rest of combat.
